cast.name: 南希·特拉维斯 Nancy Travis
迈克·普涅夫斯基 Mike Pniewski

writer.name: 本杰明·安德森 Benjamin Anderson

this_title: Rescued By Faith: The Connie and Larry Van Oosten Story
introduction: Based on a true story, in 2017, Connie (Travis) and Larry Van Oosten (Pniewski) are jolted awake by a masked gunman standing at the foot of their bed. Abducted from their home and locked inside a hidden bunker, the couple must endure days of torment while their captor attempts to steal away their life savings.During a tense trip to the bank, Connie risks everything to secretly alert authorities, setting off a frantic search. As the pressure mounts and their captor—someone with a chilling connection to their past—grows increasingly unstable, Connie and Larry cling to their faith, unsure if help will reach them in time.
chinese_title: Rescued By Faith: The Connie and Larry Van Oosten Story
